name: io.github.getaegis/aegis
description: Credential isolation for AI agents. Inject secrets at the network boundary.

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_MASTER_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Master encryption key for the credential vault

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_SALT
environmentVariables.description: Hex-encoded 32-byte salt for key derivation (generated by aegis init)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for vault databases and registry (default: .aegis/)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error (default: info)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_LOG_FORMAT
environmentVariables.description: Log output format: json or pretty (default: json)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_REQUIRE_AGENT_AUTH
environmentVariables.description: Require agent authentication on every request (true/false, default: false)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_POLICY_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Policy enforcement mode: enforce, dry-run, or off (default: enforce)

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_METRICS
environmentVariables.description: Enable Prometheus metrics endpoint (true/false, default: true)
